evaluation_criteria.name: semantic_match
evaluation_criteria.description: Check whether the values represented by both strings match semantically. E.g. '1,2,3' matches 'one, two, three'. Ignore formatting differences like extra spaces. If all values match, mark as True.

evaluation_criteria.name: transcription_quality
evaluation_criteria.description: Rate overall transcription quality: 1 (unusable), 3 (some errors but gist preserved), 5 (word-perfect).
